title: Paper Kite Manor
description: Added some placeable food and furniture decorations to decorate your manor and set up sumptuous dinners, as well as some cute little guys!
body:
# Paper Kite Manor 纸鸢庄园

![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-Java%20Edition-brightgreen)
![Forge](https://img.shields.io/badge/%20Forge-1.20.1-orange)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-BSD3+MIT%20-blue)

Added some placeable food and furniture decorations to decorate your manor and set up sumptuous dinners, as well as some cute little guys! It features huge placeable food, new plants that can't be found in the wild, vintage style furniture decorations, and a few pending updates - yes, this is a mod in the making! Requires dependency on the GeckoLib

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ejfWbrWj/images/d9015a95aa7126a454dcc6fa3ad5a777e2175e72.png)
